steps.description: Add normalized outcome label and bounded outcome metric contracts for decision outcomes and insight candidate outcomes.

Add the narrow InsightCandidateOutcome persistence contract confirmed by Q60 B, with five minimal backend APIs; the schedule endpoint is used by InsightExplorationGraph, validates 1m/2m/5m/30m/1h/2h/4h horizons, rejects low-frequency horizons, and derives due_at. The 2m fallback is selected before calling the backend.
Update OutcomeGraph run output to include counts by source type, final status, normalized label, and bounded compact-evidence context capped at 15 lines when fresh evidence is used.
Keep CLI output bounded and update workflow README if command output shape changes.
